title: QuantumScape Q2 2025 Results: Expanded Partnership with VW plus a New OEM Partner
text: QuantumScape reported Q2 2025 results with improved loss metrics and expanded partnerships. The company recorded $8 million in Q2 2025 customer billings, continuing its transition toward revenue-generating activities. The quarter saw significant partnership announcements, including the expanded agreement with PowerCo and engagement with new automotive OEMs. Management highlighted progress on the Eagle Line facility installation and QSE-5 cell development. The company narrowed its net loss compared to prior year Q2, reflecting better cost management and operational improvements. Customer engagement expanded with technical evaluations ongoing with additional major automotive manufacturers. The company reaffirmed its full-year 2025 adjusted EBITDA loss guidance and capital expenditure projections. Liquidity remained strong at over $800 million, providing runway for continued development activities.
